raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Climate Crisis Act, Assembly Bill 1395, would require California to reach carbon neutrality by 2045.",
    "AB 1395 would direct the state to reduce greenhouse gas emissions by 90% below 1990 levels by 2045.",
    "The bill aims to phase out gas- and diesel-fueled cars and trucks in favor of zero-emission vehicles.",
    "AB 1395 proposes reducing or eliminating natural gas in homes and businesses.",
    "The bill seeks to end oil and gas extraction in California.",
    "The state would pursue technologies that capture carbon dioxide from industrial facilities and remove existing carbon dioxide from the atmosphere.",
    "Some of the carbon capture technologies referenced in the bill are still being developed or do not currently exist.",
    "The bill mandates that carbon capture or removal projects must not pollute surrounding communities or pose a public health risk."
  ]
}
```
